title: Viewer controls and SVG interaction
description: Implement 04-engine-api/03-views controls and SVG navigation: controls=true UI, base-view selector, overlay checkboxes, fit/reset buttons, diagnostics indicator, mouse wheel zoom, drag pan, responsive sizing, and state-preserving overlay/view updates.
triage_notes: Cut from docs/specs/v0.1 acceptance: engine minimal criteria 7, 9, 10, 14, 15 plus views controls sections. Starts after TASK-005 external src/diagnostics basics or can run in parallel after render controls stabilize.
